name: @radzor/email-send
description: Send transactional emails via Resend, SendGrid, or raw SMTP. Supports HTML/text content, attachments, CC/BCC, reply-to, and batch sending.

inputs.name: apiKey
inputs.description: API key for Resend or SendGrid. Not needed for SMTP.

inputs.name: smtpHost
inputs.description: SMTP server hostname. Required for SMTP provider.

inputs.name: smtpSecure
inputs.description: Use TLS for SMTP connection (true for port 465).

outputs.name: sendResult
outputs.description: Result with message id, recipients, and send status.

events.name: onSent
events.description: Fired when an email is successfully sent or queued.

params.name: message
params.description: Email message with to, subject, html/text, and optional cc/bcc/attachments.

actions.name: sendBatch

params.name: template
params.description: Email template (subject, html/text) applied to each recipient.

actions.description: Send the same email to multiple recipients individually.

llm.constraints: Node.js only. Resend and SendGrid require API keys. SMTP requires server credentials. The from address must be verified with your provider.
